title: Secure Multi-Factor Enrollment Portal

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Secure Multi-Factor Enrollment Portal

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(200,150) scale(0.5)'>
   <!-- Card Container -->
   <rect x='-100' y='-50' width='200' height='100' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
   <!-- Card Header -->
   <text x='0' y='-20' textAnchor='left' fill='#C06C88' fontSize='18' fontFamily='Arial'>Multi-Factor Enrollment</text>
   <!-- Password Field -->
   <g transform='translate(0,0)'>
      <rect x='10' y='10' width='180' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C56' opacity='0.2'/>
      <text x='10' y='15' textAnchor='left' fill='#FFFFFF' fontSize='14' fontFamily='Arial'>Password</text>
   </g>
   <!-- Password Strength Indicator -->
   <rect x='10' y='-30' width='180' height='10' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
   <!-- OTP Verification Code Field -->
   <g transform='translate(0,40)'>
      <rect x='10' y='10' width='180' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C56' opacity='0.2'/>
      <text x='10' y='15' textAnchor='left' fill='#FFFFFF' fontSize='14' fontFamily='Arial'>OTP Verification Code</text>
   </g>
   <!-- OTP Verification Code Input -->
   <g transform='translate(0,70)'>
      <rect x='10' y='10' width='180' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C56' opacity='0.2'/>
      <text x='10' y='15' textAnchor='left' fill='#FFFFFF' fontSize='14' fontFamily='Arial'>Enter OTP Code</text>
   </g>
   <!-- Submit Button -->
   <g transform='translate(0,100)'>
      <rect x='10' y='10' width='180' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
      <text x='10' y='15' textAnchor='left' fill='#FFFFFF' fontSize='14' fontFamily='Arial'>Submit</text>
   </g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates for password strength and OTP verification code
Must handle password strength validation (e.g., password strength indicator changes color based on password strength)

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Secure Multi-Factor Enrollment Portal

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, password strength validation, and OTP verification code handling.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
